case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS AFRICAN TREKS AND SINOSOVIET EXPEDITIONS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,215.66 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT AFRICAN TREKS AND SINOSOVIET EXPEDITIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
